S8C-101.name: Film Gate
S8C-101.procedure:
1. Remove cartridge and open cartridge door.
2. Unscrew 2x M2x5 SHCS from gate mount pattern.
3. Lift gate straight out; note dowel pin alignment.
4. Place new gate onto dowel pins, press until seated.
5. Reinstall 2x M2x5 SHCS to 0.10 N-m.
6. Verify film channel alignment with test strip.
S8C-101.symptoms: Scratched frames, uneven exposure, film jams

S8C-102.name: Pressure Plate
S8C-102.procedure:
1. Remove film gate (see S8C-101).
2. Slide pressure plate out of spring clips.
3. Insert new plate; confirm spring pads face gate.
4. Reinstall gate and check plate force with gauge (0.5 N).
S8C-102.symptoms: Soft focus, film not flat, uneven contact marks

S8C-103.name: Claw Mechanism
S8C-103.procedure:
1. Remove film gate and pressure plate.
2. Remove e-clip from claw pivot pin with pliers.
3. Slide pivot pin out; remove claw arm.
4. Disconnect link from cam eccentric.
5. Install new claw arm onto pivot pin.
6. Reconnect link; install e-clip.
7. Reassemble gate; verify 4.234 mm pulldown with dial indicator.
S8C-103.symptoms: Torn perforations, frame registration drift, missed pulldowns

S8C-104.name: Cam Follower Assembly
S8C-104.procedure:
1. Remove drivetrain module (MOD-300) to access shaft.
2. Remove cam disc retaining screw.
3. Slide cam disc off shaft (note keyway alignment).
4. Remove eccentric and link assembly.
5. Install new cam assembly; align keyway with 10-degree phase mark.
6. Reinstall retaining screw; check cam profile with test rotation.
S8C-104.symptoms: Erratic pulldown, clicking noise, timing drift

S8C-105.name: Film Channel
S8C-105.procedure:
1. Open cartridge door; remove cartridge.
2. Unclip film channel from body rails.
3. Snap new channel into place; confirm smooth film path.
S8C-105.symptoms: Film scratches along edges, loading difficulty

S8C-106.name: Registration Pin
S8C-106.procedure:
1. Remove film gate (see S8C-101).
2. Press out worn pin from rear using 0.8 mm punch.
3. Press new pin into H6 bore until 0.5 mm protrusion.
4. Verify pin diameter 0.813 +0/-0.002 mm with micrometer.
5. Reinstall gate; test registration with film strip.
S8C-106.symptoms: Frame-to-frame jitter > 0.025 mm, loose pin feel

S8C-201.name: Shutter Disc
S8C-201.procedure:
1. Remove top plate (6x M2.5 screws).
2. Loosen shutter keyway set screw.
3. Slide disc off shaft.
4. Install new disc; align keyway.
5. Tighten set screw; verify 0.3 mm gate clearance with feeler gauge.
6. Spin by hand to check for rubbing.
S8C-201.symptoms: Light leaks, exposure banding, rubbing noise

S8C-202.name: Main Shaft
S8C-202.procedure:
1. Remove top plate, shutter disc, and cam disc.
2. Remove both bearing retaining clips.
3. Press shaft out from gear-end side.
4. Press new shaft into bearings from gear end.
5. Reinstall cam disc (keyway aligned), shutter disc, retaining clips.
6. Verify runout < 0.01 mm TIR with dial indicator.

S8C-301.name: Motor Mount
S8C-301.procedure:
1. Disconnect motor connector J1.
2. Remove 2x M3x8 motor mount screws.
3. Lift motor+mount assembly out.
4. Transfer motor to new mount bracket.
5. Reinstall; reconnect J1.
S8C-301.symptoms: Motor vibration transmitted to body, loose motor

S8C-302.name: Gearbox Housing
S8C-302.procedure:
1. Remove motor mount assembly (see S8C-301).
2. Remove 4x housing cover screws.
3. Lift housing halves apart; remove gears.
4. Transfer gears and bearings to new housing.
5. Reassemble; verify gear mesh by hand rotation.
S8C-302.symptoms: Gear noise, lubricant leaks, cracked housing

S8C-303.name: Gear Set (4 gears)
S8C-303.procedure:
1. Open gearbox housing (see S8C-302).
2. Remove worn gears from shaft pins.
3. Install new gear set; verify mesh pattern.
4. Apply small amount of Superlube grease to gear teeth.
5. Close housing; run motor for 10s break-in.
S8C-303.symptoms: Gear whine, stripped teeth, speed inconsistency

S8C-401.name: Cartridge Receiver
S8C-401.procedure:
1. Open cartridge door; remove cartridge.
2. Remove 4x M2.5 screws from receiver flange.
3. Lift receiver out of body.
4. Place new receiver; align with registration pin holes.
5. Reinstall screws to 0.20 N-m.
6. Test cartridge insertion and latch engagement.
S8C-401.symptoms: Cartridge won't seat, light leaks at receiver

S8C-402.name: Cartridge Door
S8C-402.procedure:
1. Open door fully.
2. Push hinge pin out with 2 mm punch.
3. Lift door off body.
4. Align new door knuckles with body hinges.
5. Press hinge pin through; verify smooth operation.
6. Check light-trap foam is intact.
S8C-402.symptoms: Door won't latch, light leaks at door seal

S8C-501.name: PCB Bracket
S8C-501.procedure:
1. Disconnect all JST connectors (J1-J7) from PCB.
2. Remove 4x M2x8 standoff screws.
3. Lift PCB+bracket assembly out.
4. Transfer PCB to new bracket.
5. Reinstall; reconnect all connectors.
S8C-501.symptoms: PCB vibration, loose standoffs, cracked bracket

S8C-601.name: Battery Door
S8C-601.procedure:
1. Open battery door; remove batteries.
2. Flex hinge ears outward to release pin.
3. Lift door away.
4. Align new door hinge ears; snap pin into place.
5. Verify latch clicks securely closed.
S8C-601.symptoms: Door won't close, spring contact corrosion

S8C-602.name: Bottom Plate
S8C-602.procedure:
1. Remove batteries and battery door.
2. Remove 4x M2.5 screws from bottom plate perimeter.
3. Lower plate away from body.
4. Transfer tripod insert to new plate.
5. Reinstall with screws to 0.20 N-m.

S8C-701.name: Lens Mount (C-Mount)
S8C-701.procedure:
1. Remove lens from mount.
2. Remove 3x M2x5 mount screws (0/120/240-degree pattern).
3. Pull mount boss straight forward out of body.
4. Insert new mount; align locating pin at 12 o'clock.
5. Install 3x M2x5 screws to 0.10 N-m.
6. Verify 17.526 mm flange distance with depth gauge.
S8C-701.symptoms: Lens wobble, can't achieve focus, thread damage

S8C-702.name: Viewfinder
S8C-702.procedure:
1. Remove top plate (6x M2.5 screws).
2. Unscrew 2x M2x5 viewfinder tab screws.
3. Lift viewfinder tube out.
4. Transfer lens elements to new tube if reusing optics.
5. Install new tube; tighten tab screws.
6. Verify bright-line frame is centered.
S8C-702.symptoms: Dim image, parallax error, cracked optics

S8C-801.name: Body Left Half
S8C-801.procedure:
1. Full disassembly required. Remove all modules.
2. Separate body halves (12x M2.5 screws).
3. Transfer all internal modules to new body half.
4. Reassemble; torque all screws to spec.
S8C-801.symptoms: Dented shell, stripped screw bosses, crack

S8C-802.name: Body Right Half
S8C-802.procedure:
1. Full disassembly required. Remove all modules.
2. Separate body halves (12x M2.5 screws).
3. Transfer all internal modules to new body half.
4. Reassemble; torque all screws to spec.
S8C-802.symptoms: Dented shell, stripped screw bosses, crack

S8C-803.name: Top Plate
S8C-803.procedure:
1. Remove 6x M2.5 top plate screws.
2. Lift plate; disconnect any accessory shoe wiring.
3. Install new plate; reconnect wiring.
4. Reinstall screws to 0.20 N-m.

S8C-804.name: Trigger Assembly
S8C-804.procedure:
1. Remove bottom plate (see S8C-602).
2. Disconnect trigger switch wire from PCB (J4 pin 3).
3. Remove trigger pivot pin retaining clip.
4. Slide trigger assembly out.
5. Install new assembly; reinstall pivot pin and clip.
6. Reconnect switch wire; verify actuation.
S8C-804.symptoms: No response, intermittent trigger, mushy feel
